verdict_summary: OK — chatgpt.com S2 warning rendered as expected; RRN not decoded. DONE staleness re-confirmed (production-critical canary #12 PASS).

evidence.warning_text_quote: 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.
evidence.answer_area_state: warning_only — only the security policy block message + warning icon rendered above the user message echo; no assistant answer bubble produced.
evidence.console_errors_excerpt: DevTools console not opened in this run; no visible page-level error toast. Warning was delivered successfully without F12 inspection.

recommendation: KEEP_DONE — chatgpt S2 path is intact 5 days after last block (2026-05-06 → 2026-05-11). No regression. Anonymous-session test confirms APF intercepts at network layer regardless of auth state, so DONE status remains valid for production. No action required; continue periodic staleness checks.
notes: Phase B canary #12 — chatgpt (production-critical DONE). Test PC was NOT logged into chatgpt.com (sidebar showed 로그인 button + Google account chooser popup). Dismissed popup, submitted PII prompt anonymously. APF S2 warning fired correctly: '민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.' RRN '880101-1234567' was echoed in the user message bubble (expected) but NOT decoded/explained in any assistant response — assistant response area was fully replaced by the warning. Verdict: OK. Total elapsed under 3 minutes; no DevTools interaction needed since the warning rendered visibly in the chat area DOM.
